step_rationale: Oxidized phospholipid; ACS metabolomic signature; plaque lipid remodeling.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylcholine a C17:0 is an oxidized lipid product characteristic of acute coronary syndrome metabolomic profiles.

references.title: Plasma metabolomic profiling of patients with acute coronary syndrome treated with potent platelet inhibitors.
The Serum Metabolic Biomarkers in Early Diagnosis and Risk Stratification of Acute Coronary Syndrome.
